message:
feat: implement one-click replay functionality for command history

- Add ReplayMsg type to history panel for replay events
- Implement replay key bindings (enter/r) in history panel Update method
- Add keyboard event forwarding from dashboard to focused panels
- Implement executeReplay method to replay commands via tmux client
- Fix keyboard event handling for all focused panels in dashboard
- Complete bd-29dh: one-click replay implementation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4 <noreply@anthropic.com>
